summary: Tested Member Pages new features: Team Management, Currency Selection (26 currencies), Platform Fees (8%), POS transactions with fee handling, Authorization checks, and Public Page View with referral code. Fixed critical bug in PublicPageView.jsx where AuthContext null check was missing.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - AuthContext destructuring error when user not logged in. Line 81: 'Cannot destructure property user of useContext(AuthContext) as it is null'

critical_code_review_comments: PublicPageView.jsx line 81: Fixed null AuthContext handling - always use optional chaining when destructuring context values that may be null
seed_data_creation: Test pages created and cleaned up automatically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Member Pages features (Team Management, Currency, Fees, POS with 8% fee, Public View) are working. WebSocket connection warnings in console are expected (real-time sync feature). PublicPageView.jsx bug was fixed during testing.
